activities.note: Sun Group CEO reviewed revised commercial terms over coffee. Positive sentiment overall — interested in moving to LOI within 2 weeks if COO confirms revised fee structure (2.75% base + capped tech services).
Central Group VP Development asked for itemised technical services breakdown. Wants to compare against IHG/Accor benchmarks.
BIM Group Chairman's office confirms LOI countersignature pending final board sign-off this Friday.
PMS vendor delayed contract finalisation. COO escalated to CEO and vendor leadership. Licensing approval also at risk — local authority review extended by 2 weeks.
Vingroup board reviewed Proposal v3. Hospitality Development Director confirmed positive direction. Written outcome expected by Monday next week.
Toured KDI Holdings' beachfront plot. Owner aspires to 300-key luxury beach resort. Site has direct beach access, clean title. Some flooding concerns during monsoon — needs design mitigation.

Sun Group Chairman dinner at private residence. Strategic conversation: signaled interest in Fusion partnership for Phuket and Bali assets if APAC mandate expands. CEO to follow up with formal letter of intent.
Sent Central Group revised proposal preview. Owner team reviewing internally.
Aligned on HMA terms with BIM Asset Director. Termination clause + fee escalation language to be revised by BIM legal next week.
Proposal v3 submitted to Vingroup via secure portal. Includes branded residences upside scenario.
Met BRG asset team. Heritage conversion remains blocked by local licensing. Owner concerned about timeline slip. BDD considering whether to maintain pipeline status.
NDA executed via DocuSign with Ayala Land. Formal qualification phase begins.
Site visit with Sun Group asset team. Owner requested wellness programming examples — Fusion to provide 3 brand case studies.
LOI executed in person with BIM Chairman. HMA drafting commences. Move stage to LOI Signed in pipeline.
Strategic alignment with Central VP Development on Bangkok + Phuket pipeline. Open to multi-asset relationship.
Sun Group Chairman pinged about a separate Phuket land bank opportunity — Chairman thinks Fusion brand would fit. CEO to call back.
Recruitment Plan flagged Amber: department heads pending board approval. HR Director driving resolution.
Sakura REIT Investment Director responded to intro email. Interested in Japan market entry but wants local partner clarity first.
Internal weekly BD review with COO. Escalated Hoi An licensing risk and Hanoi pre-opening PMS issue. Two items now flagged Red on watchlist.
Inbound enquiry from Ciputra Group — Bali resort partnership interest. Qualification phase to begin once NDA executed.
Pre-LOI proposal sent to BIM Group ahead of in-person LOI signing.
